name: a-stock-analysis
tagline: ClawHub (74★): 提供A股实时行情、分时成交量分布及主力资金动向分析，支持持仓管理和盈亏监控。
verdict: Every command depends on the `uv` Python runner with no install note or availability check, so the skill breaks immediately on a machine without it. It also never says what to do when a quote/K-line fetch fails or a stock code is invalid, and carries no version tracking to flag changes.

highlights.summary: The skill depends entirely on external quote/K-line APIs (this line and the surrounding 数据源 table) but nowhere states what to do if a fetch fails, a stock code is invalid, or the A
Every command invokes `uv` (a non-universal Python runner/tool) with no requirements section, install note, or availability check anywhere in the file.
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
